steps.instruction: This is one of three protocols updated from protocols developed with Protocol Designer. The three protocols are: [48 MCT to 1mL Vial](https://develop.protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/6b8c90) [48 Samples to MCT](https://develop.protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/6b8c90-2) [EtOH 48 Sample to 1mL Vial](https://develop.protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/6b8c90-3) In this protocol, the p50-single channel pipette is used to transfer 50µL between a custom 5mL tube rack and a custom 1mL tube rack. --- To purchase tips, reagents, or pipettes, please visit our [online store](https://shop.opentrons.com/) or contact our sales team at [info@opentrons.com](mailto:info@opentrons.com) * [P300 Single-Channel Pipette (GEN1)](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) * [Opentrons 300µl Pipette tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-300ul-tips) * Custom 1mL Tube Rack + Tubes * Custom 5mL Tube Rack + Tubes --- **Deck Layout** **Slot 1**: Custom 5mL Tube Rack + Tubes (for samples 1-24) **Slot 2**: Custom 1mL Tube Rack + Tubes (for samples 1-24) **Slot 4**: Custom 5mL Tube Rack + Tubes (for samples 25-48) **Slot 5**: Custom 1mL Tube Rack + Tubes (for samples 25-48) **Slot 7**: [Opentrons 300µl Pipette tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-300ul-tips)
Specify your parameters on this page.
Upload your protocol into the OT App.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support article.
